t1.gist: Use RocketMQ transactional half-messages for ban event emission (over outbox and CDC), closing the dual-write gap.
RocketMQ delivery on this cluster is at-least-once; ban-lifecycle consumers must be idempotent.
Messages exhausting retries land in %DLQ%ban-consumer and nothing consumes or alerts on it (verified with a poison message).
Write the DLQ replay runbook and wire an alert on the DLQ topic (open).

t2.gist: Choose Yoti facial age estimation for the AU U16 flow; Veriff is the documented runner-up; AWS Rekognition rejected.
AU under-16 enforcement begins 10 Dec 2025 (statutory, hard legal deadline for age assurance).
What is the fallback when Yoti estimation confidence is below threshold — block, document verification, or restricted access? (blocking)

t3.subject: ban-service-consumer
t3.gist: Changed the ban-service consumer timeout from 60s to 30s after the k6 load test; deployed.

t3.subject: ban-service-consumer
t3.gist: At 60s timeout, redelivery storms start ~1400 rps; at 30s, p99 consume latency 2.1s and no storms.

t3.subject: ban-service-consumer
t3.gist: DLQ topic retention is 48h (cluster default), not the 7 days the oncall doc assumes; late replays impossible.

t3.subject: dlq-replay-runbook
t3.gist: DLQ replay runbook written and linked from the oncall/pager docs — step closed.

t3.subject: dlq-replay-runbook
t3.gist: Should DLQ replays be capped per tenant to avoid one tenant starving others? (open, not blocking)

n1.gist: DLQ replay runbook written and linked from the oncall wiki — the open runbook next step is done (closed).
Replay ordering is not guaranteed: replayed messages append to the tail of the topic, so consumers can see a replayed event after newer events.
Replays stay manual-only for now (no auto-replay cron); nightly auto-replay rejected as too risky until idempotency keys land.
Add idempotency keys to the ban consumer next week (open, owned by the note author).

n2.gist: Ban-service consumer batch size raised 32 -> 64 after Friday's backlog; queue drains ~2x faster, no timeout errors.
Yoti sandbox age-estimation flow works end to end in staging, ~1.4s p50 per check.
What do we do with users who fail age estimation twice? (open, non-blocking).
